name: n_concepts
description: Number of concept IDs in the column name path

name: loop_number
description: Loop instance index (NULL if not looped)

name: primary_source_concept_id
description: 9-digit concept ID for the Primary Source (Survey / Biospecimen / ...)

name: secondary_source_concept_id
description: 9-digit concept ID for the Secondary Source (the specific survey)

name: source_question_concept_id
description: 9-digit concept ID for the Source Question (grid/select-all parent; NULL if standalone)

name: question_concept_id
description: 9-digit concept ID for the leaf Question

name: response_concept_id
description: 9-digit concept ID for the Response option (NULL for free-text/numeric)

name: leaf_role
description: Role of the leaf concept in the dictionary (question / response / ...)

name: question_in_dict
description: True if the leaf question concept ID appears in the data dictionary

name: secondary_source_match
description: True if the stamped secondary source matches the dictionary entry
